selected_title: The influential factors analysis about human resource management outsourcing
question: Which measurable boundary in “The influential factors analysis about human resource management outsourcing” changes how Outsourcing should be evaluated after “AN EXPLORATORY ASSESSMENT OF THE LINKAGES BETWEEN HRM PRACTICES, ABSORPTIVE CAPACITY, AND INNOVATION IN OUTSOURCING RELATIONSHIPS”?

evidence_spans.text: For the sake of rising the competitive power, many modern companies are absorbed in developing their own core business and adopting outsourcing strategy about the non-core business. The outsourcing of human resource management as big part of enterprise strategy and function areas has aroused great concern in domestic enterprises. This article analyzed and summarized the influencing factors about human resource outsourcing by the basic human resource outsourcing theory.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Outsourcing, Business through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 68 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
